features: [3 Channel Dash Cam 210° Wide Angle] VANTRUE E360 ACE 3 way dash cam delivers a resolution of 1944P+1944+1080P at 30fps, clearly to recording road details like road signs and number plates. The triple dash cam equipped with a wide 210°+ 210°+165° field of view to record the front inside and rear of the car, and even the sides of the car window can be clearly captured! So that you no longer have to worry about the accident that happened on the side of your car.

[5.2K Panoramic 360° Dashcam] With advanced panoramic stitching technology, E360 ACE car dash cam combines footage from front and inside cameras into a seamless 5.2K video that can be viewed in 360° playback in Vantrue Player or Vantrue app. Playback videos in 360° panoramic mode to fully recreate the real scene while driving so you won’t miss a moment. The hidden car dash cam features a user-friendly 1.54-inch touchscreen for easy operation, minimizing the inconvenience of traditional buttons.

[STARVIS 2 & Infrared Night Vision] This front inside dash cam features Sony STARVIS 2 image processor, which offers superior light collection capabilities than human eye, resulting in clearer night-time imaging. Dashcam inside camera infrared night vision allows for capture of car cabin details even in the dark, better protect car owners’ interest at night. Both front and inside cameras are equipped with HDR tech, automatically balances the exposure to enhance image sharpness and clarity.

[5G WiFi GPS/Voice Control] E360 ACE 3 way dash cam built in 5G WiFi, offering transmission speeds five times faster than 2.4G, you can view panoramic playback of the E360's recordings, download, edit, and share videos on your phone. The 2 channel dash cam comes with a GPS mount that accurately tracks vehicle’s location, perfectly recording driving routes and automatically calibrating the time. Voice control allowing you to control it with simple voice commands, significantly enhancing driving safety.

[10s Buffered Parking Mode] With a hardwire kit installed, dashcam can record 24 hours a day. This car camera equipped with industry latest technology - buffered motion detection, both dash cam all 3 cameras can record 10s before it detects a movement, providing you a comprehensive video evidence once your car keyed or scratched by someone. Collision detection is designed to save your car battery, which will wake up dash cam for car to start recording as soon as it detects a car vibration.

[G-Sensor/Loop Recording] Dash cam G-Sensor detects sudden collisions and automatically locks the current video, saving it to the “Event” folder, which greatly preserves accident evidence. When the SD card is full, dash cam loop recording automatically overwrites old videos with the latest footage, eliminating the hassle of manually deleting old files. Wireless remote control(buy extra) easily turn audio on/off, snapshot, lock the video, an ideal driving partner for taxi drivers.

[Software Upgrade Online & Worry-free Service] This 360° car camera dash cam software upgrade can be done on Vantrue App, avoiding the inconvenience of wires. VANTRUE offers this dashboard camera a warranty of up to 18 months and life-time technical support. Our technical team with a higher level, so your questions and concerns can be properly handled within 24 hours.
